title: Maane Maane Lyrics Uriyadi
stanzas:
Uriyadi Maane Maane Song Lyrics
Singer : Anthony Daasan
Music : Anthony Daasan, Masala Coffee
Lyrics : Anthony Daasan

Sokkavacha pacha kili
suthu vuttu paaththadhennna
mutham onnu kaetadhukku
vetkapattu ponadhenna (2)

adi maane maane
unna uravena nenachene
unnathaane naane
en usurukkul olichene

Sokkavacha pacha kili
suthu vuttu paaththadhennna
mutham onnu kaetadhukku
vetkapattu ponadhenna (2)

sengarummbu chaareduthu
naanum senja vellakatti
engae vacha emmanasa
sollendi en chellakutty

kandaenadi adi kadhaliye
unmugatha naethuthaan.
kondaen aasai poongodiye
unkooda naan serathaan.

penne en manasu therinjum
puriyadhadhu pol
nadikkaadhe
pechu paara rendulayum
erimalaiyaa vedikadhe

adi maane maane
unna uravena nenachene
unnathaane naane
en usurukkul olichene

Sokkavacha pacha kili
suthu vuttu paaththadhennna
mutham onnu kaetadhukku
vetkapattu ponadhenna (2)

konja kaalam boomiyila
naam porundhom vazhathaan.
indha jenmam podhadhadi
unna naanum aalathaan. (2)

chellamani nee irundhal
en vahkayum sola thaan
pulla kutti pethu vazhum
aalam vizhudha polathaan.

kanne enna vittu neeyum
odhungi poga nenaikkadhe
kadhaliye kadhalicha
enna neeyum marakkadhe..

adi maane maane
unna uravena nenachene
unnathaane naane
en usurukkul olichene

Sokkavacha pacha kili
suthu vuttu paaththadhennna
mutham onnu kaetadhukku
vetkapattu ponadhenna (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Maane Maane'?

The song 'Maane Maane' expresses themes of love and emotional connection, reflecting the feelings of longing and attachment.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Uyiradi'?

The movie 'Uyiradi' explores complex relationships and the emotional struggles of its characters, making the song's themes resonate within the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Maane Maane'?

The song is sung and composed by Anthonydasan, who also wrote the lyrics, showcasing his multifaceted talent.

When was 'Maane Maane' released?

'Maane Maane' was released on January 27, 2016, as part of the movie Uyiradi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Maane Maane', the protagonist expresses deep feelings of love and longing, encapsulating the emotional turmoil that comes with relationships. The song serves as a poignant reminder of the connections we cherish and the heartache that sometimes accompanies them. With Anthonydasan's soulful rendition, listeners are taken on a journey through the complexities of love. The melody's melancholic yet romantic vibe makes it a perfect fit for moments of reflection and intimacy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maane Maane from Uyiradi is a soulful melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Anthonydasan's captivating vocals and heartfelt lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of relationships. The unique blend of emotional depth and musicality makes it a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: If a green parrot is caught and kissed, what will happen to it?
Oh dear, I think of you as my connection, I am here, alive in this world.
Oh dear, I think of you as my connection, you are me, I am alive in this world.
If a green parrot is caught and kissed, what will happen to it?
I have made a beautiful flower, where did I place it? I will tell my beloved.
Oh my love, I have seen you, you have captured my heart. I have come together with you, my desire is like a blooming flower.
Oh girl, my heart is confused, don't act like you don't understand. Don't speak too much, it can lead to trouble.
Oh dear, I think of you as my connection, I am here, alive in this world.
Oh dear, I think of you as my connection, you are me, I am alive in this world.
If a green parrot is caught and kissed, what will happen to it?
For some time, we have been together on this earth. In this life, I will also be with you.
If you are there, my words will flow like a river, like a flower blooming in the world.
Don't think of leaving me, my love, don't forget me after loving me.
Oh dear, I think of you as my connection, I am here, alive in this world.
Oh dear, I think of you as my connection, you are me, I am alive in this world.
If a green parrot is caught and kissed, what will happen to it?
